evidence.snippet: We have certified a wide array of solutions for engine and airframe temperature, pressure & fluid sensors; power distribution; power generation; motors; heat exchangers; high-speed fans; RF measurement solutions; motion control; fluid and gas transfer hoses; high performance, open architecture, rugged computing; and advanced liquid cooling and pumping solutions.

### The Most Accurate, Rugged, and Reliable Sensors for Military & Aerospace
AMETEK Sensors and Fluid Management Systems designs and manufactures aircraft sensors. We are aircraft sensor experts serving both the military and commercial markets with a complete sensor suite that measures anywhere in the aircraft: temperature, pressure, flow, fluid level, acceleration, proximity, speed and position.

items.notes: AMETEK SFMS designs and manufactures aircraft sensors covering temperature, pressure, flow, fluid level, acceleration, proximity, speed and position; Solartron also makes LVDT displacement sensors

evidence.snippet:
### Rugged Embedded Computing Products
Abaco Systems is a global leader in modular, high performance, open architecture, standards-based rugged embedded computing for the most demanding applications in defense and industry. Our products and solutions are found in high-profile military/aerospace sea, land and air programs, plus commercial and industrial organizations in which rugged reliability is mission-critical.

items.notes: Abaco Systems provides high-performance rugged embedded computing for defense programs; AMETEK PDS also offers actuation and utility controllers

evidence.snippet: ### RF Measurement Solutions

items.notes: NSI-MI Technologies provides RF measurement solutions; Creaform provides 3D scanning; Taylor Hobson and ZYGO provide metrology instruments

evidence.snippet:
### High-Performance Heat Exchangers
AMETEK Hughes-Treitler is the industry leader in high-performance compact, plate-fin heat exchangers and thermal management sub-systems for the Aerospace & Defense Industry. HT specializes in custom build-to-specification applications where thermal performance, weight, structural integrity and reliability are key considerations. HT provides products for the most challenging applications and requirements.

items.notes: Hughes-Treitler supplies compact plate-fin heat exchangers; AAG, PDT, and Rotron supply cooling and thermal management systems; FMH supplies fluid/gas transfer hoses

AMETEK Airtechnology Group (AAG) is a design to manufacture business that specializes in developing and manufacturing custom (build-to-specification) thermal management and motion control products for the Aerospace, Defense, Oil & Gas and Rail industries.
